title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider in LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (now renamed “Open WebUI”); install via Docker, acts like ChatGPT interface.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Unofficial interactive CLI wrapper with readline prompts, conversation history, and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub-Copilot-like VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline suggestions and chat.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; sync/async, POJO mapping, Spring Boot starters available on Maven Central.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB; includes FastAPI backend and React frontend.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Curated recipes: function calling, vision models, fine-tune, Docker GPU, LangGraph agents, etc.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package for the Ollama JavaScript SDK; 50k+ weekly downloads.

title: ollama PyPI
summary: Official Python package; install via pip install ollama, 100k+ monthly downloads.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for Ollama; published on crates.io.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that chats or generates images using local Ollama models and slash commands.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service with a chosen model for use in CI pipelines.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that brings local LLM power into Slack threads via Ollama; easy Render deployment.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a “Ask Ollama” command to summarize notes or answer questions locally.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Community Elixir client with GenServer behaviour for streaming chat and embeddings; published on Hex.
